description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

�新 Newly posted (Published: June 30, 2026)

We are recruiting choir members for the 19th Beethoven Symphony No. 9 Performance (with Chorus), taking place on December 20 (Sunday, Reiwa 8). No prior choir experience is required.

【Practice Schedule】
Every Wednesday from October 14 to December 16, 7:00 p.m. to 9:00 p.m., at Hanno Citizens' Hall

【Instructors】
Choir Director: Mikishin Ishizuka; Piano Accompanist: Mao Takada

【Fees】
General: ¥20,000 (includes rehearsal participation, performance admission, and 3 S-class tickets)
Junior high and high school students: ¥3,000 (includes rehearsal participation and performance admission)
Rehearsal fees are paid at the desk upon first attendance on or after October 14

【How to Apply】
Submit your application by October 2 (Friday) by fax or email with the following information: address, full name (with furigana), gender, phone number, email address, voice part, whether you have prior experience singing in Symphony No. 9, height (including heel height), school name (for students in high school and below), and whether you wish to purchase sheet music.

Beethoven Symphony No. 9 Performance Organizing Committee (Hosoda)
Phone: 042-974-8574 Fax: 042-974-8574
Email: mieko-k@xpost.plala.or.jp

【Pre-rehearsal for Choir Members with Experience】
September 9 (Wednesday) – Soprano and Alto
September 16 (Wednesday) – Tenor and Bass
September 23, 30, and October 7 (Wednesdays) – All voice parts
All sessions: 7:00 p.m. to 9:00 p.m., at Citizens' Hall
To register for pre-rehearsal, call by September 1 (Tuesday). Those who mark "attending" on the application form do not need to register separately.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/shiminseikatsubu/shiminkaikan/11951.html
summary: ℹ️ 19th Beethoven Symphony No. 9 Performance (with Chorus) – Choir Members Wanted
